scenarioTitle: First body check-in and goal alignment
stepsSummary: Set body goal and log first body measurement with notes.
expectedSummary: Body history records the entry and reflects selected units/goals cleanly.
summary: BUG: UAT-003 First body check-in and goal alignment - Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
reproSteps: Navigate to Settings and select a body goal target.
Validate newly created record in body history section.
expected: Body history records the entry and reflects selected units/goals cleanly.
recommendation: Fix the failing Onboarding flow and add a regression assertion for this scenario.
acceptanceCriteria: Scenario UAT-003 completes without blocking errors.
Verify: Body entry is persisted with entered values.
Verify: History list reflects new measurement immediately.
